creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 208902
security-openssl111-clang.tar.gz

security/openssl111 fails to build on 13.0-CURRENT r354143 with error:

Assertion failed: (isSimple() && "Expected a SimpleValueType!"), function getSimpleVT, file /usr/src/contrib/llvm/include/llvm/CodeGen/ValueTypes.h, line 253.

- Latest ports tree, default port OPTIONS
- DEFAULT_VERSIONS=       perl5=5.30 ssl=openssl111 python=2.7
- make.conf:

CPUTYPE?=       corei7-avx

.if !empty(.CURDIR:M/*/ports/*)
CFLAGS=         -O2 -pipe -fcolor-diagnostics
SSP_CFLAGS=     -fstack-protector-strong
.endif


Build log tail/backtrace, sources and script attached
